name: codebase-inspector
description: CLI for orchestrating Codex-powered codebase inspection swarms.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test tests/*.test.mjs tests/*.test.ts tests/unit/*.test.ts tests/integration/*.test.ts tests/e2e/*.test.ts
scripts.test:watch: node --import tsx --test --watch tests/*.test.mjs tests/*.test.ts tests/unit/*.test.ts tests/integration/*.test.ts tests/e2e/*.test.ts
scripts.validate: npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build
